prompt: Create a "sad" mood variation of this exact penguin character by changing facial expression only. NON-NEGOTIABLE RULE: do NOT draw ANY mouth element of any kind (no mouth line, no curved mouth, no open mouth, no smile, no frown, no teeth, no tongue, no lip shape). The character has a beak; keep beak anatomy exactly as in the reference and communicate emotion only through eyes, eyebrows, cheeks, and beak orientation/detail. Target emotion: sad expression via droopy eyes, raised inner brows, and subdued beak posture. Keep body pose, head position, limb positions, silhouette, camera framing, orientation, scale, and proportions exactly unchanged. Keep identical line style, stroke thickness, and color palette. No new colors. Soft cute style. White background.
